Seatmap Canvas — condensed reference for AI agents
==================================================

WHAT IT IS
Seatmap Canvas (@alisaitteke/seatmap-canvas) is an open-source JavaScript/TypeScript library for interactive seat selection in stadiums, theaters, cinemas, and event spaces. It renders SVG seat maps with D3.js, supports zoom/pan at venue/block/seat levels, and ships React, Vue, Angular, and Next.js wrappers. MIT license.

INSTALL
  npm install @alisaitteke/seatmap-canvas

MINIMAL USAGE (vanilla JS)
  import { SeatMapCanvas } from '@alisaitteke/seatmap-canvas';
  import '@alisaitteke/seatmap-canvas/dist/seatmap.canvas.css';

  const seatmap = new SeatMapCanvas('.container', { resizable: true });
  seatmap.data.replaceData([
    {
      id: 1,
      title: 'Section A',
      seats: [
        { id: 'A1', x: 0, y: 0, title: 'A1', salable: true },
        { id: 'A2', x: 40, y: 0, title: 'A2', salable: true },
      ],
    },
  ]);

DATA MODEL
  DataModel → BlockModel[] → SeatModel[]
  BlockData: { id, title, seats[], labels?, color?, gap?, rotate? }
  SeatData: { id, x, y, title?, salable?, color?, note?, custom_data? }
  Load data via seatmap.data.replaceData(blocks[]) — there is no setData().

LINKS
  Docs:     https://seatmap.io/
  Demo:     https://seatmap.io/demo
  NPM:      https://www.npmjs.com/package/@alisaitteke/seatmap-canvas
  GitHub:   https://github.com/alisaitteke/seatmap-canvas
  React:    https://seatmap.io/frameworks/react
  FAQ:      https://seatmap.io/seo/faq
